description: Research and summarize what a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) is, including its purpose and key components.
Investigate and list other methodologies related to data protection assessments, such as Privacy Impact Assessments (PIA) and Risk Assessments.
Gather information on the legal requirements for conducting a DPIA, including relevant regulations (e.g., GDPR).
Explore the benefits and challenges of conducting a DPIA.
